title: Doughnut+ Addon Title
description: Super clean Donut SMP main menu title and panorama.
body:
# Donut SMP custom title + panorama
Enjoy a clean view of the Donut SMP server spawn with a custom title and no annoying splashes.

- custom title
- custom panorama
- no splashes


___
**Do not copy or repost this pack as your own!**
